title: melica littoralis
intro: Melica littoralis, also known as sea melick, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Melica littoralis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
